title: neomammillaria ritteriana var. quadricentralis
intro: Neomammillaria ritteriana var. quadricentralis is a rare and lesser-known variant of the Neomammillaria ritteriana cactus plant, characterized by its unique quadricentral stem structure. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Neomammillaria ritteriana var. quadricentralis include wound healing, pain relief, and immune system support, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Herbal preparations of Neomammillaria ritteriana var. quadricentralis often involve the use of its stems and flowers, which can be dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
